name: Freshness stale day boundary
sensitivity: controls manual review on stale data

name: Minimum official sources for Action-Ready
sensitivity: controls source score and Action-Ready cap

name: Full source score
formula_or_transform: official sources >= min and no conflict

name: Partial source score
sensitivity: medium impact on Watch vs Review

name: Benchmark win denominator
calibration_method: NOT_APPLICABLE derived from 3 windows times 2 benchmarks

name: Recovery risk score cap
sensitivity: limits risk score after long recovery

name: Fallback aggregated enabled
sensitivity: changes fallback handling in intake promoter

name: New Top5 asset alert minimum
sensitivity: alerts on any new Top5 asset

name: Overexpansion consecutive threshold
sensitivity: alerts after more than two consecutive overexpansions

name: Dry-run default safety flag
sensitivity: prevents implicit real-send or action path

name: Mail send enabled default
sensitivity: keeps notification in draft unless enabled
